title: I Miss You
why_this_song: I Miss You by Blink-182 (2003) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: Where are you? And I'm so sorry
I cannot sleep, I cannot dream tonight
Don't waste your time on me
You're already the voice inside my head (I miss you, miss you)
Don't waste your time on me
You're already the voice inside my head (I miss you, miss you)

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "miss" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "miss" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "time" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "time" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: I miss you, I miss you
Where are you? And I'm so sorry
Don't waste your time on me

exercises.prompt_en: What kind of person do you imagine the narrator of "I Miss You" is? Describe their age, mood, and situation using at least three details from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: Que tipo de pessoa você imagina ser o narrador de "I Miss You"? Descreva a idade, o humor e a situação usando pelo menos três detalhes da letra.

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask Blink-182 one question about "I Miss You", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para Blink-182 sobre "I Miss You", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "I Miss You" in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "I Miss You" com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
